name: Hawk AI
description: Hawk AI — Anti-money laundering platform combining explainable AI with human review for SAR filing and transaction monitoring.

seo.title: Hawk AI — Fraud & Risk Management
seo.meta_description: Hawk AI: Hawk AI — Anti-money laundering platform combining explainable AI with human review for SAR filing and transaction monitoring.

when_to_use: Explainable AI-driven SAR filing for AML compliance teams
Transaction monitoring with human review queue management
False positive reduction for bank AML alert remediation
Case management workflow for financial crime investigators
Regulatory reporting automation for FINCEN and FATF filings

pros: Built-in SAR workflows for compliance ops
cons: Smaller than NICE Actimize or Oracle
Case UI still maturing for large teams
review.verdict: A credible cloud-native AML option for mid-market banks, but narrower than full-suite vendors.
review.best_for: Mid-market banks and fintechs modernizing AML with explainable ML and SAR automation.
review.not_for: Teams needing fraud, ATO or market abuse in the same platform.
